entities.name: Memorable Quotes
entities.context: Framework element for capturing 3-5 impactful verbatim quotes with attribution, timing, and contextual significance

entities.name: Salient Questions
entities.context: Framework element for capturing 3-5 strategically important questions with action hints and priority assessment

entities.name: Stakeholder Research
entities.context: B31 methodology for capturing landscape insights about organizations and industries, distinct from individual stakeholder information

entities.name: Action hints
entities.context: Specific, concrete follow-up actions derived from salient questions - emphasis on specificity over generic 'follow up'

entities.name: hiring manager AI
entities.context: Referenced as example of specific action hint - 'Demo the hiring manager AI' vs vague follow-up

relationships.context: Each salient question should include a specific action hint indicating concrete next steps
Both are extraction frameworks within the same conversation analysis methodology (v1.5)
